caption: A video sequence begins with a close-up shot of a stylized, reflective white object resembling an eye or a lens, with a blue liquid-like center. A blue banner at the bottom contains the text "Basil Chapman" and "The Tiger Technicians Hour | June 8th, 2022." The camera pans and zooms out, transitioning from the abstract white shape to reveal a white book cover. By the end of the sequence, a photograph of a man with glasses and short brown hair is visible on the book cover. Accompanying text on the book reads "Tiger Technicians Hour with host: Basil Chapman Author of: CD book 'The Chapman Wave' and the Opening Call newsletter." The blue banner remains constant throughout the clip. In the final frame, a partial logo ending in ".COM INVESTORS" appears in the bottom right corner.
